classificationRules.name: NLP_Pipeline_PII_Article
classificationRules.description: Flags articles where the NLP enrichment step detected PII entities (Person, PhoneNumber, or Email categories from Azure Cognitive Services Language API). The hasPii field in the silver layer JSON is set to true for these articles.

dataPatterns.description: Matches silver layer JSON blobs where hasPii is true — set by fn-enrich when Language API detects Person, PhoneNumber, or Email entities

sensitivityLabel.name: Confidential
sensitivityLabel.description: Applied to articles containing named individuals, phone numbers, or email addresses

classificationRules.comment: This rule scans blob content, not column values — configured for JSON file scanning on the silver container. Applied during nightly Purview scan of articles-silver.

classificationRules.name: NLP_Pipeline_Person_Entity
classificationRules.description: Flags articles containing named persons detected by Language API NER. Targets the entities array in silver layer JSON.

dataPatterns.description: Matches silver JSON blobs containing at least one entity of category Person

sensitivityLabel.name: Confidential
sensitivityLabel.description: Article contains named individuals identified by NER

classificationRules.name: NLP_Pipeline_Phone_Pattern
classificationRules.description: Secondary pattern-based rule — catches phone numbers in article content that Language API may have missed. Applies to both bronze (raw NewsAPI content) and silver layers.

dataPatterns.description: US/international phone number pattern — E.164 and common formats

classificationRules.name: NLP_Pipeline_Email_Pattern
classificationRules.description: Pattern-based email detection across bronze and silver layers.

sensitivityLabels.name: Public
sensitivityLabels.description: Publicly available news content with no PII detected

sensitivityLabels.name: Confidential
sensitivityLabels.description: Content containing personally identifiable information — named individuals, phone numbers, or email addresses

deploymentNotes.howToApply: Import via Microsoft Purview portal → Data Map → Classifications → New Classification Rule, or via Purview REST API: POST /scan/classificationrules/{name}
deploymentNotes.integrationPoint: fn-enrich sets hasPii=true in silver docs. Purview scans confirm and build the lineage graph from raw → silver → gold → Search.
